notes: Critical duplicate const/let variable declarations (BUL_MAX, BUL_LIFE, BUL_SPEED) will cause SyntaxError crashes, and ship invulnerability timer is never decremented making the ship permanently invincible after respawn.
A critical bug prevents ship.invul from ever decrementing, making the player permanently invulnerable and invisible after starting the game.

The build has recognizable Asteroids visuals and mostly correct controls, but it contains fatal JavaScript redeclaration errors and major gameplay-state bugs that prevent it from being considered a properly functional or playable game.
